message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #333333
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #999999
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #F8F8F8
  BoxBorderColor #CCCCCC
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

box "VideoSink" #FFFFFF
participant VideoSink as VideoSink
end box

box "VideoDecoder" #FFFFFF
participant VideoDecoder as VideoDecoder
end box

box "VideoReceiver" #FFFFFF
participant VideoReceiver as VideoReceiver
end box

box "RTPReceiver" #FFFFFF
participant RTPReceiver as RTPReceiver
end box

box "Transcoder" #FFFFFF
participant Transcoder as Transcoder
end box

box "DPLA" #FFFFFF
participant DPLA as DPLA
end box

box "AzureKVSClient" #FFFFFF
participant AzureKVSClient as AzureKVSClient
end box

== Receive RTP ==
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : Receive RTP ...

== Receive Video ==
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : Receive Video

RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : RtpReceiver ...
RTPReceiver -> Transcoder : OnRtpPacket
Transcoder -> DPLA : OnRtpPacket

DPLA -> DPLA : PreConnection
DPLA -> DPLA : OpenRtpPacket
DPLA -> DPLA : SignalReadEvent
DPLA -> AzureKVSClient : OnReadEvent
AzureKVSClient -> AzureKVSClient : ReadFrame
AzureKVSClient --> DPLA : OnReadEvent()

Transcoder -> Transcoder : RtpTransportProtocol\n(transport protocol)
Transcoder -> Transcoder : RtpTransportProtocol\n(transport protocol)
Transcoder -> DPLA : OnRtpPacketReceived

RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : RtpReceiverStateController
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : SetState
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : SetStateController

VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : StartVideoDecode()

VideoSink -> VideoReceiver : SurfaceAvailable(surface)
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : VideoReceiver(surface)
VideoReceiver -> VideoDecoder : IncomingVideoFrame(frame)
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VideoDecoder(frame)
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VideoDecoderInit()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : AddVideoDecoder()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VideoDecoderStart()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VideoDecoderThreadStart()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : Decode()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : OnDecodedFrame()
VideoDecoder -> VideoSink : OnFrame()

VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : RESUME
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : HandleDecodedFrame()

@enduml
